calibration.purpose: fit codebooks + activation salience + Doctor; tuning allowed

holdout.purpose: final capability confirmation; NEVER tuned on

validation.purpose: gate promotion decisions during the campaign

failure_conditions: Metal and CPU disagree beyond tolerance
Doctor cannot improve a failing row within its reserve
dominated in both quality and cost by a lower-rate candidate

gate_hierarchy.measures: CPU vs Metal PQ assignment + direct execute
gate_hierarchy.name: bounded_operator_parity

gate_hierarchy.measures: expert output relative divergence (true residual, real tokens)
gate_hierarchy.name: expert_functional_divergence_beats_ternary

gate_hierarchy.measures: router top-k agreement downstream of packed experts
gate_hierarchy.name: router_agreement_preserved

gate_hierarchy.measures: logit cosine, logit KL, top-k token agreement on short sequences
gate_hierarchy.name: short_end_to_end_logits_token_quality

gate_hierarchy.measures: perplexity / NLL on the fixed holdout corpus + deterministic generation
gate_hierarchy.name: complete_artifact_evaluation
gate_hierarchy.promote_threshold: holdout NLL within declared tolerance of reference

gate_law: Do not make a red gate green by weakening its threshold after seeing results. Set thresholds from real baseline measurements. No family advances to the full run based only on weight error; no run is called successful based only on bounded expert slices.
hard_invariants: exact whole-artifact byte accounting; packer fails if a row exceeds its exact budget
no uncounted dense residual in Doctor
deterministic bytes: same seed => identical packed bytes
CPU is authoritative for final selection where Metal reductions are nondeterministic
router top-k selection integrity preserved (routing not silently altered)

parent_reference.reference_runtime_caveat: authoritative for RELATIVE orig-vs-packed divergence; not HF-parity validated for absolute perplexity
